Tu inventario es negativo. Te recomendam: Your inventory is negative. We recommend restocking a larger amount to normalize it or edit the ingredient directly.
Esta cantidad se sumará directamente al: This quantity will be added directly to the current total.
Usa el botón azul \"Surtir\" cuando lleg: Use the blue "Restock" button when new merchandise arrives. Just type the amount that arrived and the system will add it to the total automatically.
Si el nombre o la unidad de medida (kg,: If the name or unit of measure (kg, lb, liters) is wrong, use the "Edit" button to correct them.
Si un ingrediente se agotó, el sistema b: If an ingredient is out of stock, the system will automatically block the sale of dishes that use that ingredient until you restock again.
Aquí puedes ver cuánto tienes de cada in: Here you can see how much you have of each ingredient. If a number is in red or negative, it means you lack product to complete orders.
Agrupa tus platos por tipo (ej: Entradas: Group your dishes by type (e.g., Appetizers, Meats, Drinks). This makes the menu easier to read for both customers and servers.
Puedes asignar un encargado a cada categ: You can assign a manager to each category (e.g., Barman for drinks, Chef for hot kitchen) for better control.
Al pulsar \"Ver Platos\", verás solament: By clicking "View Dishes", you will only see products belonging to that specific category.
Si cambias el nombre de una categoría, t: If you change a category name, all associated dishes will be automatically updated in the system.
Este es el corazón de tu menú. Aquí pued: This is the heart of your menu. Here you can see all the dishes you offer, their photos, descriptions, and prices.
Pulsa \"Ver Receta\" para saber qué ingr: Click "View Recipe" to know which ingredients each dish has and in what quantities they are used.
Controla el precio de venta y el nivel d: Control the selling price and the difficulty level so cooks know the preparation complexity.
Asegúrate de subir fotos atractivas. Una: Make sure to upload attractive photos. A good image helps the server sell the dish better to the customer.
Aquí defines cuánta cantidad de cada ing: Here you define how much of each ingredient is used when preparing this dish. It's your kitchen's "formula".
Cuando un mesero vende un plato, el sist: When a server sells a dish, the system checks this recipe and automatically deducts the ingredients from the inventory.
Si agregas un ingrediente nuevo, asegúra: If you add a new ingredient, make sure to assign it the exact amount (e.g., 0.5 kg of meat) for accurate accounts.
Si quitas un ingrediente de la receta, e: If you remove an ingredient from the recipe, the system will stop deducting it from the stock when the dish is sold.
Busca el plato que el cliente desea. Ver: Look for the dish the customer wants. You will see the photo description and unit price to inform the customer.
Usa el recuadro de cantidad para indicar: Use the quantity box to indicate how many portions the customer wants. The system will calculate the total automatically.
Al pulsar \"SOLICITAR PEDIDO\", el siste: By clicking "REQUEST ORDER", the system verifies if there is enough stock in the kitchen and registers the sale immediately.
Si te aparece un mensaje en rojo, es que: If a red message appears, it means there are not enough ingredients. Advise the customer that this dish is temporarily unavailable.
¿Estás seguro de eliminar este usuario?: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
¿Desea eliminar este registro?: Do you want to delete this record?
Si se deshabilita, el usuario no podrá e: If disabled, the user will not be able to enter the system.
Deja la contraseña en blanco si no desea: Leave the password blank if you do not wish to change it.
Para mantenerte conectado, inicia sesión: To keep connected, login with your personal info
Ingresa tus datos personales y comienza: Enter your personal details and start your journey with us
Ingresa tus datos para crear una nueva c: Enter your details to create a new password.
Restablece tu contraseña y sigue disfrut: Reset your password and keep enjoying our services.
